name: Noemi Lopez
quote: Very easy to work with! Love the quick responses and was able to get my edit done just like my vision was described. Highly recommend! Thanks again.

name: Anton Hing
quote: I had the opportunity to work with them for a bunch of short films. Not only professional in manner but also in skills. Great people! Come to them with any project and they will assist you with amazing technical and creative knowledge.

name: Danny Astefan
quote: I use Rainscope as a regular rental house and they are nothing short of exceptional. Service is on point, gear is always in perfect condition and they're super kind! Highly recommended going to them for any of their services.
